creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Akinori MUSHA wrote:

> At Thu, 20 Sep 2001 15:10:52 +0300,
> sobomax wrote:
> > > What about configuring the rep related ports with:
> > >
> > >         CONFIGURE_TARGET=${ARCH}-freebsd${OSREL:C/\..*//}
> > >
> > > I've recently changed the Ruby ports that way to eliminate the
> > > upgrading problem.
> >
> > Uh, huh. This is possible, but it would distract users, as they will need to
> > recompile/reinstall librep, rep-gtk and Sawfish to convert to the new world
> > order. I'm not sure that it worth it.
>
> Surely you can do that when you update the triplet next time. :)

Sure. I'll do it then.

-Maxim
